prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Light that adapts to your workday.

Headline: Meet Lumina, the smart desk lamp that tunes itself to you.

Your day isn’t static—your light shouldn’t be either. Lumina automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on the time of day, your calendar, and the room’s ambient light, so your workspace always feels just right.

From focused morning deep work to late-afternoon calls, Lumina helps reduce eye strain and keeps you comfortable without a single manual tweak. Plug it in, connect once, and let the light do the thinking.

Email 1 — Launch Day
Subject: Meet Lumina: light that adapts to your workday

Hi there,

Today we’re launching Lumina—the smart desk lamp built for remote work. It automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, your calendar events, and ambient room lighting.

That means no more squinting in the afternoon, no more harsh glare during video calls, and no more fiddling with settings. Just light that feels right, all day long.

Lumina is available now for $149.

→ Get Lumina today

—The Lumina Team


Email 2 — Benefits Focus
Subject: Your desk light should do more than turn on

Hi there,

Most desk lamps are static. Your workday isn’t.

Lumina senses your environment and adapts in real time—warmer light for early mornings and evenings, brighter neutral light for mid-day focus, and subtle shifts for video calls and meetings. It’s designed to reduce eye strain and help you feel energized without distraction.

Set it once, then forget about it. Lumina just works.

Ready to upgrade your workspace?

→ See Lumina in action

—The Lumina Team


Email 3 — Social Proof + CTA
Subject: The easiest upgrade to your home office

Hi there,

Remote workers are rethinking their setups, and lighting is one of the most overlooked upgrades. Lumina brings smart, adaptive light to your desk—without the premium price tag.

At $149, it’s a simple way to make your workspace feel more comfortable and more productive.

If you’ve been waiting for a sign, this is it.

→ Bring Lumina home

—The Lumina Team

Twitter/X
1) Your desk light should adapt to your day. Lumina auto-adjusts color temperature + brightness based on time, calendar, and ambient light. No more manual tweaks. $149. #remotework #productivity
2) Morning focus. Afternoon calls. Evening wrap-up. Lumina tunes your light to match—automatically. Meet the smart desk lamp built for remote work. $149.

Instagram
1) Light that adapts to your workday. ✨
Lumina automatically adjusts brightness and color temperature based on time of day, calendar events, and room lighting. No more eye strain. No more tinkering.

$149 • Link in bio

2) Your workspace, upgraded.
Lumina brings smart, ambient-aware lighting to your desk—so your light is always just right.

Designed for remote workers 25–40. Ready to switch? $149.

LinkedIn
1) Introducing Lumina: a smart desk lamp designed for how remote teams actually work. It adapts to time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting to reduce eye strain and keep focus high. Available now for $149.
2) Remote work deserves better lighting. Lumina makes it effortless—set it once, and it auto-adjusts throughout the day. A simple, affordable upgrade for healthier, more productive workspaces.

Hero
Headline: Light that adapts to your workday.
Subheadline: Lumina is the smart desk lamp that automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting.
Primary CTA: Get Lumina for $149
Secondary CTA: See how it works

Why Lumina
Your day changes hour by hour. Lumina changes with it—no manual adjustments, no distractions. Just comfortable, balanced light that supports focus and reduces eye strain.

Features
- Adaptive lighting: Automatically shifts brightness and color temperature throughout the day.
- Calendar-aware: Warmer light for early mornings and evenings, brighter light for focus blocks and calls.
- Ambient sensing: Responds to your room’s natural light so you’re never too bright or too dim.
- Set-and-forget: One-time setup, effortless daily use.
- Designed for remote work: Clean, modern design that fits any desk.

How It Works
1) Plug in Lumina
2) Connect your calendar and set preferences
3) Let Lumina adjust automatically

Testimonials
“[Testimonial placeholder]”
“[Testimonial placeholder]”
“[Testimonial placeholder]”

FAQ
1) How does Lumina know when to adjust?
Lumina uses time of day, your connected calendar, and an ambient light sensor to dial in the right brightness and color temperature.

2) What calendars are supported?
Lumina supports major calendar providers. Connect once during setup and you’re ready to go.

3) Can I override the settings?
Yes. You can manually adjust brightness and color temperature at any time, or set custom preferences.

4) Does it work without a calendar connection?
Absolutely. Lumina can adjust based on time of day and ambient light even without calendar access.

5) What’s included in the box?
Lumina lamp, power adapter, quick-start guide, and setup instructions.

6) What’s the return policy?
We offer a 30-day return window so you can try Lumina risk-free.

CTA
Ready for better light?
Get Lumina for $149

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

Lumina Launches Smart Desk Lamp That Adapts to Your Workday
New $149 lamp automatically adjusts color temperature and brightness using time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting

San Francisco, CA — February 20, 2025 — Lumina today announced the launch of its new smart desk lamp, built specifically for remote workers who want a more comfortable, productive workspace. Lumina adjusts color temperature and brightness automatically based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting—delivering the right light without manual tweaks.

“Remote workers spend long hours at their desks, and lighting has a huge impact on comfort and focus,” said a spokesperson for Lumina. “We built Lumina to simply work in the background, so you can stay in flow without thinking about your light.”

Priced at $149, Lumina offers an affordable alternative to premium smart lighting solutions while delivering a modern, minimalist design that fits any workspace. The lamp’s adaptive lighting helps reduce eye strain and supports a more natural rhythm throughout the day.

Lumina is available now at [website URL].

About Lumina
Lumina creates modern, intelligent lighting designed for how people actually work. With a focus on simplicity and wellness, Lumina products adapt to users’ routines so they can work more comfortably and productively.

Press Contact
Name: [Press Contact Name]
Email: [press@lumina.com]
Phone: [Phone Number]

All files created:

- tagline.txt  
- hero-copy.txt

- social-posts.txt  
- landing-page.txt  
- press-release.txt
